# CMakeLists.txt for raylib wrapper
# Generated by WrapGen

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.10)
project(raylib_wrapper VERSION 1.0.0)

# Set C and C++ standards
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 99)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 11)
set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)

# Find required packages
find_package(PkgConfig REQUIRED)
pkg_check_modules(raylib REQUIRED IMPORTED_TARGET libraylib)

# Source files
set(WRAPPER_SOURCES wrapper.c)
set(WRAPPER_CPP_SOURCES wrapper.cpp)
set(WRAPPER_SOURCES ${WRAPPER_SOURCES} ${WRAPPER_CPP_SOURCES})

# Create shared library
add_library(raylib SHARED ${WRAPPER_SOURCES})
target_link_libraries(raylib PkgConfig::raylib)
target_include_directories(raylib PUBLIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR})
set_target_properties(raylib PROPERTIES VERSION ${PROJECT_VERSION})

# Create static library
add_library(raylib_static STATIC ${WRAPPER_SOURCES})
target_link_libraries(raylib_static PkgConfig::raylib)
target_include_directories(raylib_static PUBLIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR})
set_target_properties(raylib_static PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME raylib)

# Installation
install(TARGETS raylib raylib_static
    LIBRARY DESTINATION lib
    ARCHIVE DESTINATION lib
    RUNTIME DESTINATION bin)
install(FILES *.h DESTINATION include)

# Generate pkg-config file
configure_file(raylib.pc.in raylib.pc @ONLY)
install(FILES ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/raylib.pc DESTINATION lib/pkgconfig)

# Testing
enable_testing()
add_executable(test_raylib test_raylib.c)
target_link_libraries(test_raylib raylib)
add_test(NAME test_raylib COMMAND test_raylib)
